name: Azure OpenAI
description: Registers Azure OpenAI as a first-party deployment-based Responses API provider using AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY and a configured Azure OpenAI resource name.

env.description: Fallback Azure OpenAI API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Fallback Azure OpenAI resource name used to build https://{resource}.openai.azure.com/openai/v1 when no resource_name Plugin Setting is configured.
Fallback comma-separated Azure OpenAI deployment names exposed as models when deployment_names is not configured.

settings.label: Azure OpenAI API key
settings.description: Azure OpenAI API key used for inference. Falls back to AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY.

settings.label: Azure OpenAI resource name
settings.description: Azure OpenAI resource DNS label used to build https://{resource}.openai.azure.com/openai/v1. Falls back to AZURE_OPENAI_RESOURCE_NAME.

settings.label: Azure OpenAI deployment names
settings.description: Azure OpenAI deployment names to expose as models. Azure v1 requests use deployment names in the model field. Falls back to comma-separated AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENTS.

providers.name: Azure OpenAI
providers.description: Runs configured Azure OpenAI deployments through Pi's Azure OpenAI Responses API transport.
